summary: Tested all 6 requested features for Candis-Kopie AI invoice management app. All critical flows passed: login redirect, login form, dashboard, PWA assets, and logout. Minor note: 'Anmelden' text appears twice (form title + button) - must use .last selector to click the actual login button.

ui_bugs.issue: No testID on the login submit button. Two elements share text 'Anmelden' (form title + button), requiring .last selector workaround in tests. Also no testID on logout icon button in settings.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use 'boxShadow') - cosmetic, non-breaking
Console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' - cosmetic, non-breaking

action_items: Add testID='login-submit-button' to the Anmelden TouchableOpacity in login.tsx
Add testID='logout-button' to the logout icon TouchableOpacity in settings screen
critical_code_review_comments: babel.config.js correctly uses babel-preset-expo with MetaProperty transformer to handle import.meta from Zustand ESM - good fix
_layout.tsx auth guard correctly uses setTimeout(50ms) to defer navigation and avoid 'navigate before mounting' error
DATEV Export and SEPA Banking are MOCKED/simulated as per requirements
JWT key is 28 bytes (below recommended 32 bytes min for SHA256) - InsecureKeyLengthWarning in backend logs, non-blocking
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin@candis-kopie.de / admin123 auto-seeded user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login button selector: use page.locator('text=Anmelden').last (not .first) since form title and button share same text. Logout icon is at position ~(295, 110) on settings screen - a 44x44 touchable div with no text. PWA public files (manifest.json, icon-192.png, icon-512.png) all accessible via /public served correctly.

test_results.login_form_ui: PASS - Title, inputs, demo box all visible
test_results.login_credentials: PASS - admin@candis-kopie.de/admin123 works, API returns 200 with token
test_results.dashboard_after_login: PASS - Loads with stats (0 pending, 4 approved), tabs navigation visible
test_results.logout_flow: PASS - Logout icon shows confirmation dialog, confirming redirects to /login
